textByHashes.33429366a233a0b6f7073ae56c4dd1e2399f2eaf: You need to be searched before you can board.
textByHashes.8ad08bc54874bab324d024b810bf2540bf60b0e6: Because Asgarnia has banned the import of intoxicating spirits.
textByHashes.502cb9c77eed767aa30669a5aa86b21223656b31: Aha, trying to smuggle rum are we?
textByHashes.5dfe1189605f40ec0830515a753773925f344c0c: This is not the Karamja rum we are looking for.
textByHashes.acd004d0e89290551cdbc084ceb02835d25a9482: Well you've got some odd stuff, but it's all legal. Now you need to pay a boarding charge of 30 coins.
textByHashes.f2c1afe764da8d888d3a741b39974bc8cf2f9221: You're not getting on this ship then.
textByHashes.b45ea624d95f209d6573a42fd63c4469d7769bd9: Oh, I think I do. If you don't want to let me search your possessions, then you're not coming aboard this ship.
textByHashes.bc59947352c2fa57589adddf50d9811c1b0f8f71: I'm not that sort of customs officer.
textByHashes.a38fe02da0da383e8a76d48635b93dd2bbe257e8: Hang on a sec... Aren't those Karamja gloves? I thought I'd seen you helping around the island. You can go on half price mate.
textByHashes.96336c36c657561ea8e32199cf24dd2ed780a897: Yes, perhaps I could. Okay, jump aboard then.
textByHashes.8c453944153d139e27955a1314c03a4808c01302: Hey, I know you, you work at the plantation.
textByHashes.405fe7d05928dbfe982eb872aec761382f6d1208: I don't think you'll try smuggling anything, you just need to pay a boarding charge of 30 coins.
textByHashes.dc65bba2ab0df0a81c5db0370660b20830ae90b4: Spot inspection. You don't mind do you?
textByHashes.55319572a5982fbc11ebd8ac40705297979cb51b: Aha, trying to smuggle rum eh?
